title: About Amenify
content: Amenify is the leading AI-powered resident commerce platform that helps property managers and residents with services they love. Through a proprietary network of local providers, enterprise integrations, and personalized concierge tools, Amenify powers services like local retail, dining, grocery, home services, maintenance, and more. Amenify is available in 15 million homes in the USA through its API integrations powering resident engagement. Amenify has been proudly serving since 2017. For booking or support, residents can call or text at +17197671963. Amenify was founded by Everett Lynn (Founder and CEO) and Danish Chopra (Co-Founder, CTO and COO). Other leadership includes Todd Stecker (Vice President of Revenue), Nick Zamonis (Marketing, Board Member), and Ed Dailey (Finance, Board Member). Amenify has raised $20 million to date from strategic PropTech investors including UnitLeader, WISE Ventures, Corevest, and RET Ventures. Amenify also raised $4.8 million to activate 320,000 homes, as reported by Yahoo Finance. Top apartment operators have invested in the multifamily platform Amenify, as reported by Housing Wire. Amenify uses technology and scale to create unique value for residents and homeowners, local service owners, merchants for retail, grocery and dining, online brands, and financial partners. Amenify's core values are: Long-Term (prioritize lasting wins over short-term benefits), Accountability (take ownership and finish what we start), Meritocracy (equal opportunity focusing only on results), Always Learning (win or lose, every day we get better), and Win-wins (create value and do well by doing good). Amenify is hiring and looking for people who are Helpful, Hungry, Humble, and Happy. Careers inquiries can be sent to careers@amenify.com. Amenify is the fastest growing PropTech company. The in-home services industry is growing at 52% CAGR through 2029. Amenify can be contacted at the contact us page on their website.

title: Amenify Services Overview
content: Amenify offers AI-powered home services for residents and homeowners across the United States. Amenify's services include house cleaning, chores services, handyman services, food delivery, grocery delivery, dog walking, pool cleaning, lawn care, move out cleaning, and home shopping. Residents can book and track all services right from the Amenify phone app available on iOS and Android. Amenify has received over 100,000 five-star reviews from satisfied residents and homeowners. New residents get $50 off when they sign up on the Amenify platform. Amenify provides dedicated and fully managed home services. All Amenify service professionals are vetted, trained, and background-checked to ensure 5-star service quality. Amenify's concierge team is available 7 days a week for support. Amenify expanded globally by opening an office in New Delhi, India. Amenify has also stepped into the HOA (Homeowners Association) market by partnering with industry leaders.

title: Cleaning Services
content: Amenify offers professional house cleaning and apartment cleaning services across the United States. Amenify cleaning services include regular weekly or bi-weekly cleaning, deep cleaning, move out cleaning, and one-time cleaning. Amenify's cleaning professionals use eco-friendly products and modern techniques to give every space the detailed attention it deserves. All Amenify cleaners are thoroughly background-checked and trained. Amenify cleaning services are available for apartment homes and single-family houses. Amenify is a leading apartment cleaning company and specializes in house cleaning services. Residents can schedule recurring appointments or book on-demand cleaning through the Amenify app. Amenify cleaning services are available in over 500 cities across the US including New York, Los Angeles, Chicago, Houston, Phoenix, Dallas, Austin, Seattle, Denver, Atlanta, Boston, Miami, San Francisco, Washington DC, and many more.

title: Chores Services
content: Amenify offers chores services for residents who need help with everyday household tasks. Chores services include laundry, dishes, organizing, tidying up, and other household tasks that residents may not have the time or energy for. Amenify chores service professionals are vetted and trained to handle everyday home tasks efficiently and reliably. Residents can book chores services through the Amenify app on iOS or Android. Chores services are available on-demand or on a recurring schedule.

title: Handyman Services
content: Amenify offers professional handyman services for residents who need help with home repairs and maintenance. Handyman services include fixing leaky faucets, hanging pictures, furniture assembly, door repairs, minor electrical work, plumbing repairs, and other small home maintenance tasks. All Amenify handyman professionals are vetted and background-checked. Amenify can handle urgent household tasks through its handyman services. Handyman services are available to book through the Amenify app. Amenify handyman services are available in many cities across the United States.

title: Food and Grocery Delivery Services
content: Amenify offers food delivery and grocery delivery services for residents. Residents can order meals and groceries directly through the Amenify platform. Amenify Cash can now be used with Grubhub at over 375,000 locations across the United States, as announced in November 2025. Grocery delivery services ensure that fresh meals and supplies are always just a few clicks away. Food and grocery delivery is available through the Amenify app on iOS and Android.

title: Dog Walking Services
content: Amenify offers professional dog walking services for residents who have pets. Dog walking service professionals through Amenify are vetted, trained, and background-checked. Residents can book dog walking appointments through the Amenify app. Dog walking services are available on a regular schedule or on-demand basis.

title: Move Out Cleaning Services
content: Amenify offers move out cleaning services for residents who are moving out of their apartments or homes. Move out cleaning is a thorough deep clean of the entire residence to help residents get their security deposit back or leave the home in pristine condition for the next resident. Amenify move out cleaning professionals are trained and background-checked. Move out cleaning services can be booked through the Amenify app or website.

title: Resident Protection Plan
content: Amenify offers a Resident Protection Plan for residents living in multifamily apartments and homes. The Resident Protection Plan provides coverage and protection for residents against unexpected issues and incidents in their home. The plan is designed to give residents peace of mind during their stay. Details about coverage, eligibility, and pricing for the Resident Protection Plan can be found on the Amenify website or by contacting Amenify support.

title: Amenify for Property Managers
content: Amenify partners with multifamily property owners and property managers to offer resident amenity programs. Property managers can offer Amenify services as part of their amenity package to attract and retain residents. Amenify provides vetted service professionals assigned to specific communities with time windows based on data-driven resident feedback. Amenify creates all marketing assets, leverages major Property Management Software (PMS) integrations, and handles resident onboarding. Credit packages are also available for residents. Amenify provides a real-time booking engine so residents and managers can order, manage, and edit bookings safely and securely with assisted key releases. Amenify's concierge team is available 7 days a week and centralizes and analyzes data for constant improvement. Amenify helps properties drive engagement by delivering on-demand services that foster loyalty and build strong tenant relationships. Amenify helps increase revenue by monetizing amenities and generating additional income with subscription-based services. Amenify drives 5-star reviews through consistent, high-quality services like cleaning, grocery delivery, and handyman support. Properties that offer Amenify typically see higher resident retention and satisfaction scores. Amenify has a scalable technology platform and tools that power local businesses to scale to millions of apartment homes across the US. Amenify uses AI and ML for a data-driven engineering approach to provide maximum value across its portfolio of products. Andrew Stewart, Chairman of Venterra Realty (23,000 homes), stated that Amenify undoubtedly enhances resident experience.

title: Amenify for Service Providers
content: Amenify works with local service providers and professionals who want to grow their business by joining the Amenify network. Service providers on the Amenify platform can access a large base of apartment residents across the United States. Amenify provides smart service provider technology to help professionals manage their schedule, bookings, and payments. Service providers can log in to the Amenify service pro portal at servicepro.amenify.com. Providers can also log in at provider.amenify.com. Amenify's platform enables local businesses to scale to millions of apartment homes across the US for many different home services including cleaning, chores, handyman work, grocery delivery, and more.

title: Amenify Technology and AI
content: Amenify uses artificial intelligence and machine learning to power its service operations platform. Amenify takes a very data-driven approach to engineering and uses AI and ML to provide maximum value to customers across its portfolio of products. The AI system matches residents with optimal service providers based on location, availability, resident preferences, and historical performance data. Machine learning algorithms continuously improve service matching accuracy over time. Amenify's AI analyzes provider performance metrics to ensure service quality. Amenify has partnered with Visa to launch intelligent resident commerce experiences, announced in January 2026. Zego implemented Amenify into Zego Living, a new all-in-one resident commerce platform for millions of residents, in August 2025. Amenify is available in 15 million homes in the USA through its API integrations. Amenify has enterprise integrations and a personalized concierge tool to power resident engagement.

title: Amenify Contact and Support
content: Amenify provides customer support to residents through multiple channels. Residents can contact Amenify support by calling or texting +17197671963. Amenify has been proudly serving since 2017. Residents can log in to the Amenify resident portal at m.amenify.com. The Amenify app is available on iOS at tiny.cc/amenify-ios-app and on Android at tiny.cc/amenify-android-app. Amenify can be contacted through the contact page at amenify.com/contact-us. Amenify FAQs are available at amenifyconcierge.zendesk.com/hc/en-us. Amenify's Terms and Privacy policy is available at amenify.com/terms-and-privacy. Amenify's mission and values are available at amenify.com/mission-and-values. Amenify is present on LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube under the handle joinamenify or Amenify. Residents get $50 off when they sign up for the first time. Amenify's concierge team is available 7 days a week. Amenify serves over 500 cities across the United States.

title: Amenify News and Updates
content: Amenify announced a collaboration with Visa Inc. to launch Intelligent Resident Commerce in January 2026. Amenify Cash can now be used with Grubhub at over 375,000 locations nationwide, announced November 2025. Zego launched Amenify to power resident commerce portfolio-wide in August 2025, implementing Amenify into Zego Living for millions of residents. Amenify announced oversubscribed financing for the next generation of home services and commerce in August 2025. Amenify expanded globally by opening an office in New Delhi, India. Amenify stepped into the HOA market by partnering with industry leaders. Amenify raised $4.8 million to activate 320,000 homes. Amenify completed its 2025 company employee survey and shared results in February 2026, highlighting strong company culture.

title: Resident Protection Plan Details
content: The Amenify Resident Protection Plan is an affordable optional subscription that reimburses common everyday accidental damages to your rental home and certain management fees. Coverage includes: Accidental Damage Reimbursement up to $1,000 annually (max $250 per quarter) for carpet stains, damaged blinds, drywall holes, countertop nicks. Key or Fob Replacement up to $50 per instance. Lockout reimbursement up to $50 per instance. Missed Maintenance Appointment Fees up to $50 per instance. Hotel stays up to $200 if displacement occurs. This is NOT renters insurance — renters insurance covers catastrophic events like fire or theft. The Protection Plan covers everyday small incidents. To claim: a qualifying damage occurs, you pay the management company, then submit proof of payment in your Amenify app. That's it.

title: Amenify Company Facts and Investors
content: Amenify has raised $20M to date from strategic PropTech investors including UnitLeader, WISE Ventures, Corevest, and RET Ventures. Amenify currently serves more than 2 million homes in 1,000+ cities in the US. The in-home services industry is growing at 52% CAGR through 2029. Amenify has partnered with Visa to launch Intelligent Resident Commerce. Amenify Cash can be used at 375,000+ Grubhub locations across the US. Zego implemented Amenify into Zego Living platform. Amenify expanded globally by opening an office in New Delhi, India. Amenify is also entering the HOA market. For careers, contact careers@amenify.com. Amenify's culture is built on four H's: Helpful, Hungry, Humble, Happy.

title: Cleaning Services Details and Checklists
content: Amenify offers Standard Cleaning and Deep Cleaning services. Standard Cleaning includes: wipe exterior of stove, oven, microwave, refrigerator; wash/scrub/sanitize toilet, shower, tub, sink; clean countertops and mirrors; make bed and change linens; vacuum, sweep, mop floors and stairs; dust accessible surfaces including window sills. Deep Cleaning includes everything in Standard plus: deep scrub countertops and sink; load dishwasher; wipe under stove grates and range hood; clean interior of appliances; wipe baseboards, doors, door frames; clean interior of reachable windows; deep clean grout. Move-in/Move-out cleaning is also available. Subscription options: weekly, twice monthly, monthly, or one-time. New residents get $50 cleaning bonus plus $20 monthly credit. Support team available 7 days a week.

title: Service Provider Partnership Program
content: Amenify partners with local service provider companies for cleaning, chores, handyman, and other in-home services. Benefits for providers: 2-3x more jobs per day per team, background check included via API, reduce drive time by 60%, payment APIs for timeline deposits, routing and auto-dispatch technology, centralized support 7 days a week, stock options offered to selected providers. Amenify is live in 1,000+ cities in the US with average appointment rating of 4.6/5.0. Largest providers earn $100,000 per year. To become a provider, companies need their own team, insurance, and ability to pass background checks. Amenify handles marketing, billing, and administration.

title: Property Manager Benefits and Testimonials
content: Amenify provides a concierge and marketplace for residential communities. For property managers: save millions on resident gifts and leasing concessions, one-stop shop for services including food delivery and online shopping, resident wallet system where managers add cash credits, Amenify handles all onboarding/vetting/insurance/integrations, 7-day support with live chat and phone agents, major PMS integrations available. Testimonials: 'Amenify accelerated our lease-up process by at least three months, so we are rolling them out portfolio-wide.' — 'We have officially launched Amenify at 59 communities in 7 markets, with overwhelmingly positive feedback.' — 'NYC is a competitive market. Amenify is an easy plug-in that requires no work for our team.' For enterprise customers, more options are available for owners with low operating budgets.
